title: Advanced Furnace
description: An efficient, practical and convenient furnace
body:
An efficient, practical and convenient furnace

**You can perform four independent smelting processes at the same time in a furnace**

- Twice the smelting speed
- Four times the fuel loss rate

# Blocks And Items
- Advanced Furnace
- Advanced Furnace Update Tool (*shift + right click on a furnace*)

# How to get blocks or items
## Advanced Furnace

|| Crafting Table ||
|  :---:  | :---:  | :---: |
| furnace  | iron bars |furnace  |
| furnace  | iron bars |furnace  |
| iron ingot  | iron ingot|iron ingot|

## Advanced Furnace Update Tool

|| Crafting Table ||
|  :---:  | :---:  | :---: |
| iron bars | furnace |iron bars |
| furnace  | log |furnace  |
| iron ingot  | iron ingot|iron ingot|
